Caption: Voltage trends during the application of the extra urban drive test profile at the three considered operating temperatures on the fresh Panasonic NCR 18650 cell.

Trends of a) V D n and b) V A vs. temperature. Dotted lines in the figures a) and b) represent the linearized functions of V D n and V A , to be implemented in the N1 and N2 equations. R2 values of linearized functions are illustrated in figures a) and b) for V D n and V A .
